re_viewer0.21.0-alpha.1+dev

In re_viewer::external::re_chunk_store::external::arrow2::compute::arity_assign

Function re_viewer::external::re_chunk_store::external::arrow2::compute::arity_assign::unary

pub fn unary<I, F>(array: &mut PrimitiveArray<I>, op: F)
where
    I: NativeType,
    F: Fn(I) -> I,
Expand description

Applies an unary function to a PrimitiveArray, optionally in-place.

ยงImplementation

This function tries to apply the function directly to the values of the array. If that region is shared, this function creates a new region and writes to it.

ยงPanics

This function panics iff

  • the arrays have a different length.
  • the function itself panics.
